nasb.text: then hear from heaven and forgive the sin of Your people Israel, and bring them back to the land which You have given to them and to their fathers.

esv.text: then hear from heaven and forgive the sin of your people Israel and bring them again to the land that you gave to them and to their fathers.

cnv.text: 求你從天上垂聽，赦免你子民以色列的罪，領他們歸回你賜給他們和他們列祖的土地。

ccb.text: 求你从天上垂听，赦免他们的罪，带领他们回到你赐给他们和他们祖先的土地上。
